title: Agentic Workspace local work-thread select result
description: Stdout payload emitted after selecting an ignored local work-thread record.

kind.description: Discriminator for local work-thread select results.

thread_id.description: Local work-thread id selected by the caller.

previous_thread_id.description: Previously selected local work-thread id, when one existed.

preserved_keys.description: Existing index keys preserved while replacing selected_thread_id.

postcondition.description: Postcondition written to the ignored local index.

rule.description: Safety rule proving select is only local advisory state.
